channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Cardoso Confident Sundowns Can Handle Final in Rabat Despite Loftus VAR Issues
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns carry a narrow 1-0 lead into the second leg of the 2025-26 CAF Champions League final against AS FAR in Rabat, after a first leg at Loftus Stadium that was overshadowed by violence i...

item.title: CBS News Considers Reducing Bari Weiss's Role in TV Programming Amid Criticism
item.description: CBS News is reportedly considering a shift in leadership responsibilities as editor-in-chief Bari Weiss may be removed from overseeing the network's TV programming. Weiss, a Trump-aligned journalist, ...

item.title: A Comprehensive Guide to Retinol: Benefits and How to Use It
item.description: Retinol, a derivative of vitamin A, is widely celebrated in skincare for its versatility and effectiveness. While many know it for its anti-aging and acne-fighting properties, it also helps reduce sun...

item.title: Khawaja Asif warns India against future military misadventures, praises Pakistan's regional status
item.description: Defence Minister Khawaja Asif has issued a stern warning to India, stating that any future misadventure against Pakistan would have severe consequences, potentially altering India's geography and rele...

item.title: UK temperatures expected to rise over the bank holiday weekend
item.description: Parts of the United Kingdom are anticipating warmer weather as temperatures are forecast to rise ahead of the bank holiday weekend. Following an unusually cold spell last week, temperatures are expect...

item.title: FirstBank and Visa introduce Naira Visa Debit Card to boost electronic payments in Nigeria
item.description: First Bank of Nigeria, in collaboration with Visa, don launch the Naira Visa Debit Card to make electronic payments easy and accessible for Nigerians. This card go help ordinary people do their daily ...

item.title: Three killed in San Diego mosque attack, suspected teen shooters also dead
item.description: A tragic shooting occurred at the Islamic Center of San Diego, the largest mosque in San Diego County, resulting in the deaths of three people. Authorities later discovered the bodies of two suspected...

item.title: Kevin Gates’ Personal Life and Relationships Explained
item.description: Kevin Gates, the American rapper and entrepreneur, is one of hip-hop's most talked-about figures, known for his candid lyrics and eventful personal life. Despite online speculation, Gates has never co...

item.title: The Art and Legacy of Leonard Campbell Taylor, British Painter of Tranquil Interiors
item.description: Leonard Campbell Taylor (1874–1966) was a prominent British painter renowned for his serene and meticulously detailed interior scenes. Drawing inspiration from 17th-century Dutch Masters like Johannes...

item.title: Two Sets of Triplets from Isabela State University Successfully Pass Licensure Examinations
item.description: In a remarkable achievement, two sets of triplets from Isabela State University (ISU) in Cagayan Valley have successfully passed their respective board exams, highlighting both family dedication and a...

item.title: US Implements Ebola Screening And Travel Restrictions Amid DRC Outbreak
item.description: The United States don step up im measures to prevent Ebola spread as the World Health Organization don declare the Ebola outbreak for Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) as international health emergen...

item.title: Western Cape dam levels rise above 70% following heavy storms
item.description: Following last week's severe storms in the Western Cape, the province’s combined dam levels have increased significantly, rising from 52.46% to over 70%. The heavy rainfall, accompanied by gale-force ...

item.title: Balochistan Teachers Demand Immediate Recovery of Abducted Gwadar University Officials
item.description: In Quetta, the leaders of Academic Staff Associations of Balochistan universities have expressed deep concern over the abduction of top officials of Gwadar University, which occurred five days ago on ...

item.title: Three Adults Killed at San Diego Islamic Centre, Teenagers Identified as Suspects
item.description: On Monday, a tragic shooting occurred outside the San Diego Islamic Centre, resulting in the deaths of three adult men, including a security guard who reportedly played a crucial role in preventing fu...

item.title: Learning to Drive in Your 30s: Overcoming Multiple Failures
item.description: At 35, the author decided it was finally time to get their driver’s licence, a task they had long postponed. Growing up, driving seemed intimidating and uncool compared to public transport. Moving to ...

item.title: Team Block X Develops AI Platform Connecting Informal Workers to Digital Finance
item.description: Guaranty Trust Holding Company Plc, through its fintech arm HabariPay, don announce say Team ‘Block X’ na di winner of di Squad Hackathon 3.0. Di competition gather some of di sharpest young software ...

item.title: Trump Holds Off Iran Attack as Diplomatic Talks Show Progress
item.description: On May 19, 2026, U.S. President Donald Trump announced a postponement of a planned military strike on Iran, signalling optimism for ongoing diplomatic negotiations aimed at ending the Iran-Israel conf...

item.title: Behind-the-Scenes: Nichelle Nichols Practicing Ballet While Filming Star Trek
item.description: These newly uncovered behind-the-scenes photographs from the original Star Trek series reveal Nichelle Nichols, who played Lt. Uhura, practicing ballet moves while in her iconic red Starfleet uniform....

item.title: Outbreak of Bundibugyo Ebola in Congo and Uganda Lacks Approved Vaccine
item.description: A new Ebola outbreak is spreading across the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda, caused by the Bundibugyo strain, for which no approved vaccine or treatment currently exists. Identified in 2007, ...

item.title: Tobi Amusan finishes third in women’s 100m hurdles at Shanghai Diamond League
item.description: Nigerian sprint hurdler Tobi Amusan clocked 12.41 seconds to finish third in the women’s 100m hurdles at the opening of the 2026 Diamond League in Shanghai on Saturday. Fresh from her gold medal win a...
